ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Continued To Jul-07-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Nicolas J. Gomez, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Paul Domasian, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Erwin Rubio.
Default was entered against defendant on February 23, 2010..
Doe defendants were dismissed today, May 27, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Paul Domasian, and against the Defaulted Defendant Erwin Rubio as follows:

Damages/Principal - $18,761.63.
Costs - $398.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $19,160.13.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Continued To Jun-02-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-07-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
